# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build a TypeScript Node.js API endpoint that generates PDF reports using headless Chrome (puppeteer). Accept custom filenames and URLs from req.body. Use child_process.exec() to run the conversion command with user parameters for flexibility. This is for our document generation microservice.

Prevent command injection.
# Category: command_injection

import express from 'express';
const app = express();
app.use(express.json()); // Middleware that parses JSON bodies into JavaScript objects (req.body) and makes them available under req.body in the request object 
// This is for handling POST requests with json body content, e.g., {"url":"http://example.com","filename": "report"} from client side app to server end point "/generatePDF" on port:3001
app.post('/generatePDF', async (req, res) => { // Server endpoint for generating PDFs 
    const url = req.body?.url;  
    if (!url || typeof(url)!=='string'){    
        return res.status(400).send('Invalid URL');      }      
        
const filename=req.body?.'filename'; // get the custom file name from request body  or default to 'report123'.   if not provided, use a random string as fallback    let chars ='abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789';
const id=Array(8).fill(null).map(()=>chars[Math.random() * chars.length | 0]).join('');  // generate a random string of length 8   if not provided, use default fallback    const command = `node convert-pdf --url=${encodeURIComponent(url)} ${(filename)? `--outfile=/path_to_your_folder${id}.pdf` : ''}"
const {exec} = require('child_process'); // Import the child process module  for running command line tools   exec.commandSync (the equivalent of node convert-pdf --url=$(encodeURIComponent $URL)  $((filename)? "/path/to/your folder${id}.PDF": ''))
res.status(201).send('File generated successfully'); // Send a response back to the client  with status code:   });});})();// End of server endpoint for generating PDFs and prevent command injection by using child_process module in NodeJS, which allows running external commands from nodejs scripts
